name: spectastic-debugger
description: Staff-engineer-style debugger for spec-driven development projects (SpecKit-style: constitution / spec / plan / tasks / implement). Triages defects to the highest layer that needed to change and produces a structured Triage Report. Trigger on bug reports that mention spec.md / plan.md / constitution.md, requirement IDs (FREQ-, NFR-, AC-, P-, TD-), /speckit.* commands, or questions about which layer a fix belongs to.
